params.name: The 1st Electric Fan
params.description:
On Dec 17, 1880 AD, Schule successfully made the world's first electric fan.
An engineer named Byron created a spring-driven mechanical fan 50 years before the electric fan was invented. This fan is considered the prototype for the electric fan. Later, Schule improved it by replacing the spring with a motor, which officially introduced the electric fan and gave people relief from the summer heat.
